title: Pixel Edge
description: Pixel Edge enhances Minecraft’s visuals with HD clarity and sharp pixel borders, giving every texture a crisp, clean, and beautifully defined look while keeping the original vanilla style intact.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0266b5bcf19475fcf48da1f319f5e3598b390fe_0.webp)

Pixel Edge For Java Edition

Pixel Edge enhances Minecraft’s visuals with HD clarity and sharp pixel borders, giving every texture a crisp, clean, and well-defined look while keeping the original vanilla style intact.

Future Updates

This pack is currently available in 128x resolution. More resolutions will be added soon.

Recommendation

For the best visual experience, use this pack with a shader. In the preview images, I used Relta Visuals for enhanced lighting and overall appearance.

 

Note

This pack was originally made for the Bedrock Edition, and I have ported it to Java Edition. All preview images shown here were captured in the Bedrock version.
